blended.narrative: Cranmore Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 467 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.2" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: light rain showers, highs of 56°F.
Sunday: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
